note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Mateo tries to shake off the feeling of being watched, but his eyes keep drifting to the window. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo discovers a cryptic message on his computer from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo discovers a suspicious lottery ticket in his jacket pocket. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Mateo's research on the lottery algorithm yields an unsettling correlation with recent murders. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Mateo anxiously ponders the implications of his lottery win on his already fragile life. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Mateo's uneasy sleep is disrupted by a cryptic message from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Mateo discovers a suspicious lottery ticket in his jacket pocket. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Mateo's lottery win sparks a sense of disquieting responsibility Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Mateo ponders the lottery numbers, feeling an unsettling connection to the digits. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo frantically searches for any mention of the lottery in his encrypted files. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 15: Mateo frantically searches for a hidden tracking device in his flat. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 16: Mateo deletes the lottery ticket image from his phone, but can't shake off the feeling of being watched. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("A Modest Win") within Act II tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
